title: Cosmic Veil
description: A mod that adds tech and magic based off shadow.
body:
# ![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a00ee1958ba3ed5db5bb53a6876c8a09514811a.png)
 
*A shadow-drenched dimension awaits…*

**Supports Minecraft 1.20.X**

## 🧩 About the Mod

**Cosmic Veil** is a lore-rich Minecraft mod that introduces players to a haunting parallel dimension — the **Shadow Realm**. Shift between realities using mysterious items, avoid traps set by darkness itself, and uncover the secrets left behind by the **Shadow Monarch**.
## 🌘 Features

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

  - **🪞 Shifted State via Mirror Item**  
  Tap into the power of shadows by using a special **Mirror item**. This artifact allows players to enter the **Shifted** state, transporting them to a twisted reflection of the overworld — darker, emptier, and far more dangerous.

- **🕳️ Shadow Traps**  
  Beware. Not all transitions are voluntary. Get a **Shadow Trap** put on you, and you may find yourself pulled into the veil without warning...

- **🕳️ Shadow Sheild**
  People will block you into the shadows

- **🕳️ Marksman Veil**  
  People can shoot ShadowTraps saddly they get weaker...

- **🕳️ Shadow armor and Sword**
  Strong weapons forged by the shadow monarch and only only taught to those imbued with darkness

- **🕳️ Shadow Portal**
  A new Realm Awaits

- **📦 Shadow Transporter & Shadow Calibrator**  
  The **Shadow Transporter** is a powerful block capable of teleporting players across space through the Shadow Realm.  
  Use the **Shadow Calibrator** to store a location, then link it to a Shadow Transporter to travel — shifting through dimensions to arrive at the saved coordinates.  
  Perfect for fast travel… or escape.

- **👁️ New Mob: The Weeper**  
  A terrifying entity born from a failed experiment by the **Shadow Monarch**. The **Weeper** roams the Shadow Realm with a relentless hunger. It sees you — and it will not stop.
</details>

## **🌌 Deep Lore**  
  Long ago, the **Shadow Monarch** crafted a mirror to escape the mortal world. What he found was not peace — but a cursed dimension. His failure gave rise to the Weepers, who now stalk the void between light and dark.

## 🔮 Future Plans

- New shadow creatures  
- Shadow corruption mechanics in the overworld  
- Environmental storytelling & hidden ruins

## 🛠 Compatibility

- Designed for **Minecraft 1.20.1**  
- Built on **Fabric**

# WARNING
If you have iris you need indium
